subcodes.first_line: From the very beginning of the Cause, this Wronged One hath sacrificed soul and spirit, wealth, honor and comfort in the path of the Desired One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: از اول امر اینمظلوم جان و روان و ثروت و عزت و راحت کل را در سبیل مقصود
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @chastisement and requital
